title: Coccocypselum campanuliflorum

It belongs to the genus Coccocypselum, which is a part of the large and diverse family of Rubiaceae. The classification of Coccocypselum campanuliflorum reflects its characteristics and relationships with other plants in the family. Further classification within the plant kingdom includes its order, class, and kingdom, which are Gentianales, Magnoliopsida, and Plantae, respectively.
uses: Coccocypselum campanuliflorum, also known as the Campanilla or Dwarf Thalia, is a plant native to South America. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
